name: @speedora/report-builder
description: Stateless module (JSON-in/JSON-out): Export Center's report shaping, Sprint 03a. Shapes already-fetched Video/Clip/explainability/transcript data into report JSON (a video report's 11 sections, plus a simpler Clip Metadata report) - never queries Prisma, never renders PDF/Excel/CSV itself. No DB/queue access at all; see root ARCHITECTURE.md. Consumed by apps/api's export module and apps/worker's export-generate adapter (03b/03c).
